rulings.Case Title: ELLEN TSANG VS. CHARLES ENGELBERG et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 17, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT CHARLES ENGELBERG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT overruled. Cause of action under CCP 1708.7 is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY RAFFERTY ET AL VS. ALAN ABRUZZO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 17, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS ALAN ABRUZZO, SARA CORBETT, TIYA-B NUCCI and LOFT AND GARDEN, INC. AKA LOFTANDGARDEN.COM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts giving rise to Abruzzo and corporate defendant's liability as to each cause of action; (2) allege facts showing that 1- year statute of limitations does not bar this action (See Menefee v. Ostawari (1991) 228 Cal.App.3d 239). It appears on the face of the complaint that alleged illegal termination occurred "soon" after August 2012 (FAC paragraphs 19, 20); (3) allege facts regarding termination of tenancy as the complaint is uncertain, i.e. verbal/written notice (FAC paragraph 29) or contact (FAC paragraph 46 and Prayer line 21). = (501/REQ)
